ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_schedule" (
  "sched_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "sched_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled production */,
  "sched_hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day for the scheduled production */,
  "cust_part_no" TEXT /* Customer part number */,
  "wip_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of work-in-progress inventory for the part */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of parts to be produced */,
  "sched_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the production schedule */,
  "production_line_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the production line where the task is scheduled */,
  "planned_start_time" TEXT /* Planned start time of the production task */,
  "planned_end_time" TEXT /* Planned end time of the production task */,
  "actual_start_time" TEXT /* Actual start time of the production task */,
  "actual_end_time" TEXT /* Actual end time of the production task */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the schedule entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the schedule entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the schedule entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sched_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_schedule_cust_part_no FOREIGN KEY ("cust_part_no") REFERENCES customer_parts ("cust_part_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_parts" (
  "cust_part_no" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer part */,
  "part_name" TEXT /* Name of the part */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who ordered the part */,
  "part_category" TEXT /* Category of the part */,
  "part_material" TEXT /* Material used to manufacture the part */,
  "part_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the part */,
  "part_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the part */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time required to produce the part */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the part entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the part entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the part entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_part_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_parts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the customer */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the customer entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the customer entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wip_inventory" (
  "wip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WIP inventory entry */,
  "cust_part_no" TEXT /* Customer part number */,
  "qty" INTEGER /* Quantity of parts in WIP */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the WIP inventory (e.g., in process, pending inspection) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the WIP inventory is stored */,
  "expected_completion_date" TEXT /* Expected completion date for the WIP inventory */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the WIP inventory entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the WIP inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the WIP inventory entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the WIP inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wip_inventory_cust_part_no FOREIGN KEY ("cust_part_no") REFERENCES customer_parts ("cust_part_no")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production performance entry */,
  "sched_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the schedule entry for the production task */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the production task */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the production task */,
  "qty_produced" INTEGER /* Quantity of parts produced */,
  "defects" INTEGER /* Number of defects found */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the machine used in production */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the operator who performed the task */,
  "quality_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the quality of the produced parts */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the performance entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the performance entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_performance_sched_id FOREIGN KEY ("sched_id") REFERENCES production_schedule ("sched_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory history entry */,
  "cust_part_no" TEXT /* Customer part number */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the inventory change */,
  "change_qty" INTEGER /* Quantity changed */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the inventory change */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the inventory change occurred */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the operator who made the inventory change */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the inventory history entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory history entry was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the inventory history entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_history_cust_part_no FOREIGN KEY ("cust_part_no") REFERENCES customer_parts ("cust_part_no")
)
